bio_links.title: Max Fosh joins a Bobsled team

node.text:
What does confidence sound like? For musicians, it’s the sound of preparing and practicing as they pursue their dreams. The better they prepare, the more confident they’ll be.

Allianz launched the #SoundOfConfidence songwriting competition with @langlangfoundation and legendary songwriter and producer @guyachambers, to prepare the musicians of tomorrow for their future careers. The three winners: @sirine_music  @rayskaya and @joshislandmusic were invited to finalize their tracks in the Sleeper Sounds Studio in London. Here’s what happened. #Allianz #LangLang #ConfidenceInTomorrow #songwriting

node.text:
What does confidence sound like?

For musicians, it’s the sound of preparing and practicing as they pursue their dreams. The better they prepare, the more confident they’ll be.

Find out how preparation creates the Sound of Confidence in our film starring @langlangpiano 

Allianz, as a long time partner of Lang Lang, has teamed up with the Lang Lang Foundation and acclaimed British songwriter @guyachambers to launch the Sound of Confidence, a songwriting competition for new young talent. Find all information here: @langlangfoundation 

#Allianz #LangLang #ConfidenceInTomorrow #SoundOfConfidence #songwriting @alyssa_mvo

node.text:
Food is hope. As part of our continued collaboration with various NGOs supporting Ukrainians, we have donated 500,000 euros to @wckitchen.

Allianz supports @chefjoseandres, the founder, and chief feeding officer of WCK, as he and his team distribute meals and food kits to towns in the Kyiv region and other liberated areas.

As well as being first to the frontlines, WCK’s efforts go far beyond this and even include supporting Ukraine’s farmers.

Since February, Allianz has apportioned 7.2 million euros, out of the 10 million euros set aside, to assist those displaced by the invasion of Ukraine. And we will continue our unwavering support.

node.text:
Get ready for the epic ABB @fiaformulae #BerlinEprix double-header this weekend at Tempelhof – and join us at the Allianz E-Village!

Can Formula E legend and UN Clean Air Ambassador @lucasdigrassi make it a record three wins in Berlin? Find out what powers his passion in our electrifying #SparkConfidence film. 

“I believe modern motorsport can reshape the future – the freedom to breathe clear air is a basic right.” 

Watch the race live from wherever you are – link in bio.

#TeamAllianz #ABBFormulaE #BehindYouForWhatsAhead #SparkConfidence #Motorsport #Racing

node.text:
We all have a purpose in life. Have you found yours yet?
If not, Sumit Antil can help. Listen to the man who is changing the perceptions of disability in India and hear tips on how you can set your own goals and find your purpose in life. 

All in the latest episode of our #AWinningMindset podcast with @Paralympics.

Find the link to all our episodes in the bio.

#BehindYouForWhatsAhead #WorldwideInsurancePartner #Paralympics

node.text: Whether its Para ice hockey, wheelchair curling or Para snowboard, we can’t wait for the Beijing 2022 Paralympic Winter Games. node.text:
Steer too hard, and you can lose speed. Not enough, and you can lose control. That’s the balancing act of bobsleigh! 👀 

Find out how the world’s best bobsledders fight for every hundredth of a second. 

#MilanoCortina2026 #Bobsleigh #StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
Tonight feels special. ✨

After all the waiting and preparation, the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026 have officially started.

As athletes from all over the world are stepping into their moment, we are looking forward to cheering 📣 them on in peaceful competition. 

And we are grateful for all the teams, coaches and volunteers behind them who make this moment a reality.

Allianz is proud to be the Official Insurer.

#MilanoCortina2026 #StepIntoLife #Allianz

node.text:
❄️ 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟲 𝗪𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗢𝗹𝘆𝗺𝗽𝗶𝗰𝘀 🥇🥈🥉 The Allianz Arena shines in the colors of the German and Italian flags at the start of the Olympic Games in Milano Cortina. 🇩🇪🏟️🇮🇹
 
This is a symbol of solidarity and stands for the unique power of sport to bring people from all nations together. We keep our fingers crossed for all athletes and wish them a peaceful and successful Olympic and Paralympic Games.
